bdk_300.note: Batman 2.94 seed and standard trough recipe did not start a live scoring game on the Home/Costco firmware.

beav_butt.note: The current VBS-derived recipe booted and changed NVRAM but produced no donor-decoded live score.

tz_ifpa.note: The tz_94h seed plus extracted table recipe did not start donor-decoded scoring on the IFPA rules ROM.

tz_l1.note: The tz_94h seed plus extracted table recipe also failed to produce a live score on retail L-1.

t2_l2.note: Player 1 score was verified at 0x1730, but repeated physical trough simulations could not establish a durable Player 2 turn; do not infer the remaining player offsets yet.

taf_l1.note: The extracted physical-trough recipe and both native L-1 and aliased L-7 seeds accepted input but never entered a live scoring game.

rct400.note: The exact seed exposed credits, but the physical four-ball trough recipe (including a full release ripple) never left attract mode.
